creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok, thanks for your feedback.

I've already run a poudriere build and everything built fine, see the logs here, e.g. for 9.3/amd64 :

http://box.martymac.org/FreeBSD-Packages/bulk/FBSD93amd64-default/2014-10-28_11h39m29s/

Well, if the games runs fine for you, I think I'll commit everything on the next week (also depending on the answers I'll get from the CFT sent on ports@ : http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-October/096288.html)

Thanks again,
Best regards,

Ganael.
